intended_use: The LungVision System is intended to enable users to segment previously acquired 3D CT datasets and overlay and register these 3D segmented data sets with fluoroscopic live X-ray images of the same an
intended_use_full: The LungVision System is intended to enable users to segment previously acquired 3D CT datasets and overlay and register these 3D segmented data sets with fluoroscopic live X-ray images of the same anatomy in order to support catheter/device navigation during pulmonary procedures.
ground_truth: Geometry testing and lesion contrast validation on real data; ground truth methodology for registration accuracy assessment based on real clinical CABT data from LungVision procedures
other_metrics: Mean registration error with standard deviations: simulated cases (3.15 mm ± 3.2 mm, n=500); rigid body model cases (3.64 mm ± 1.57 mm, n=93); CBCT cases (5.34 mm ± 3.32 mm, n=191). Lesion marking accuracy was comparable between CABT and AI Tomo imaging modalities.
